ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who placed the order */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date the order was placed */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered) */,
  "shipping_address" TEXT /* Address to which the order is shipped */,
  "billing_address" TEXT /* Address from which the payment is made */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "discount_code" TEXT /* Discount code applied to the order */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Employee or system that created the order */,
  "last_modified" TEXT /* Last date and time the order was modified */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_status FOREIGN KEY ("status") REFERENCES order_status ("status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "preferences" TEXT /* Customer preferences for products and categories */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Customer's phone number */,
  "address" TEXT /* Customer's address */,
  "city" TEXT /* Customer's city */,
  "state" TEXT /* Customer's state */,
  "country" TEXT /* Customer's country */,
  "zip_code" TEXT /* Customer's zip code */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Customer's date of birth */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the customer account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category the product belongs to */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "brand" TEXT /* Brand of the product */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the product */,
  "dimensions" TEXT /* Dimensions of the product (e.g., '10x20x30 cm') */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the product was added to the inventory */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the product information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category FOREIGN KEY ("category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_products" (
  "order_product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product in an order */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in the order */,
  "price_per_unit" REAL /* Price per unit of the product at the time of the order */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product in the order */,
  "subtotal" REAL /* Subtotal for the product in the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_products_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_order_products_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_pairings" (
  "pairing_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product pairing */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order */,
  "product_id_x" INTEGER /* Reference to the first product in the pairing */,
  "product_id_y" INTEGER /* Reference to the second product in the pairing */,
  "pairing_frequency" INTEGER /* Frequency of the product pairing */,
  "last_paired" TEXT /* Last date the products were paired in an order */,
  "pairing_score" REAL /* Score indicating the strength of the pairing (e.g., based on purchase frequency) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pairing_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_pairings_product_id_x FOREIGN KEY ("product_id_x") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_pairings_product_id_y FOREIGN KEY ("product_id_y") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_pairings_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the category was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the category information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each price record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product */,
  "discount_price" REAL /* Discount price of the product */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the price is denominated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date for this price */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date for this price */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_prices_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "order_status" (
  "status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each status */,
  "status_name" TEXT /* Name of the status */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the status was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the status information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of interest */,
  "interest_level" INTEGER /* Level of interest (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the preference was set */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the preference information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who wrote the review */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating of the product (e.g., 1-5 scale) */,
  "comment" TEXT /* Comment by the customer */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date the review was written */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was helpful */,
  "not_helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes indicating the review was not helpful */,
  "verified_purchase" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the review is from a verified purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_reviews_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_availability" (
  "availability_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each availability record */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product in stock */,
  "warehouse_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the warehouse where the product is stored */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the stock was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("availability_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_availability_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "marketing_campaigns" (
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each marketing campaign */,
  "campaign_name" TEXT /* Name of the marketing campaign */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the campaign */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the campaign */,
  "target_category" TEXT /* Category targeted by the campaign */,
  "budget" REAL /* Budget allocated for the campaign */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* Employee or system that created the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the campaign information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("campaign_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_marketing_campaigns_target_category FOREIGN KEY ("target_category") REFERENCES product_categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "campaign_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "campaign_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the marketing campaign */,
  "orders_generated" INTEGER /* Number of orders generated by the campaign */,
  "revenue_generated" REAL /* Revenue generated by the campaign */,
  "clicks" INTEGER /* Number of clicks on campaign ads */,
  "conversions" INTEGER /* Number of conversions (e.g., purchases) from the campaign */,
  "cost_per_click" REAL /* Cost per click for the campaign */,
  "return_on_ad_spend" REAL /* Return on ad spend (ROAS) for the campaign */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the performance record was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time the performance record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_campaign_performance_campaign_id FOREIGN KEY ("campaign_id") REFERENCES marketing_campaigns ("campaign_id")
)
